events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: this is a **fail / critical** condition — an unprotected trench ≥5 ft with workers inside is an imminent cave-in hazard under 29 CFR 1926.652(a)(1). Immediate action required is to evacuate the trench, classify soil, and install a protective system (sloping, benching, shoring, or shield) before anyone re-enters, along with confirming safe egress and spoil setback.
